title: Tet2 deficiency mitigates epigenetic aging in clonal hematopoiesis
author: Karmakar, Shilpita
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Github repository  
  https://github.com/LabShengLi/CHIP-DS  
  File list  
 
  CHIP-DS-main.zip:  all analytical scripts. 
  scRNA_input.rds:  single-cell RNA data for all samples in an R object. 
  scATAC_inputs.tar.gz:  all single-cell ATAC inputs data for analysis scripts. 
 
 *Correspondence should be addressed to O.H. (   oguro@uchc.edu   ) and S.L. ( sheng.li@jax.org ).
